name: Jaana
answer1:
True justice
satisfies all,
false none.
answer2:
Let justice be
thy calling not
thy excuse!
question: Art thou just?
yes:
Many a grave has
been unjustly
filled in the
name of justice.

name: a guard
answer1:
A good life is
inspired by love
and guided by
knowledge.
answer2:
Within this
chamber justice
is served.
question:
Dost thou have
business before
the court?
no:
Then do not
disturb the
proceedings!

name: a guard
answer2:
That'll be the
right hand cell.
careful in
there!
question:
Hast thou come
to turn thyself
in?
yes:
In which cell
dost thou
belong, felonies
or misdemeanors.

name: Calumny
answer2:
Mandrake root is
found only in
the Fens of the
Dead and in the
Bloody Plains
where the ground
is always damp.
question:
Can thou
cast it?

name: Talfourd
question:
Can thou
honestly claim
to be guilty of
no crime ever?
no:
Then do thy
penance in a
cell, and with
the felon
search ye well.

name: Flamis
job:
I hold the
fabric of the
true nature of
justice.
answer1:
The virtue of
justice draws
its nature from
the principles
of truth and
love!
question:
Hast thou always
been just?

name: Dwp
job:
Welcome thee to
Yew city of
justice!
answer1:
Love no one more
than the truth,
for justice
seeks no favors.
Temper thy
justice with
understanding.
question:
Dost thou
like it?

name: a poor beggar.
answer1:
I have gotten
chests in the
townes and
killed non-evil
creatures.
answer2:
He is a mean
nasty ugly
villain!
question:
Should thou be
in with the
felon?
yes:
Thou art in the
wrong cell.

name: Vorpal
job:
I eat people
who bug me!
question:
Art thou here
to bug me?

name: a ranger
answer2:
Where the deer
and the antelope
play.
question:
Ever heard of
such a place?
yes:
Seldom is heard
a discouraging
word!
no:
Ah, what'ya have
to ruin it for!

name: Short Round
answer1:
I think Indi's
on a quest!
answer2:
I'm not so sure,
but it should be
fun!
question:
Art thou
having fun?
yes:
Write to Lord
British and tell
him!!!
no:
I am so sorry we
all wish you
would!

name: Frida
job:
See my poor baby
I beg for him.
answer1:
Oh, no, my baby
is dying!
question:
Wilt thou give
me money so that
I can get my
baby healed?

name: Pinrod
answer2:
Justice is
hardest to find
at the point of
a sword, the
steel is an
agent of
justice,
humanity the
perpetrator!
question:
Fight ye for
justice?
yes:
Good, the
druids chant
the mantra!

name: a guard
job:
To preserve
the peace and
insure justice!
answer1:
A good life is
inspired by love
and guided by
truth!
answer2:
Justice means
not only to
punish the bad
but also to
reward the good!
question:
Art thou
always just?

name: Druid
answer2:
The shrine is to
the east then
north!
question:
Dost thou have
the rune?
yes:
Now learn the
mantra, and seek
the green stone
in 'Wrong'!
no:
Ask Talfourd for
he knows of the
rune.
